:::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
![Control-flow view of `OpalElement` as the bridge from parsed OPAL element definitions to runtime `ElementBase` objects.](figures/opal-element-control-flow.png){fig-alt="TikZ preview of the OpalElement control-flow bridge." width="85%"}
::::

:::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
\begin{figure}
\centering
\resizebox{0.86\linewidth}{!}{\input{sections/sandbox/figures/tikz/opal-element-control-flow.tikz.tex}}
\caption{Control-flow view of \texttt{OpalElement} as the bridge from parsed OPAL element definitions to runtime \texttt{ElementBase} objects.}
\end{figure}
```
::::
